name: 蘑菇香煎嫩雞 Mushroom Beer Chicken
desc:
搭配碳烤蘆筍及以梅爾森拉格調製而成的蘑菇啤酒醬。
Breaded and pan-fried with mushroom beer sauce. Accompanied by grilled asparagus.

name: 凱薩沙拉 Caesar Salad
desc:
羅蔓生菜加上麵包丁, 搭配經典凱薩醬。
Classic caesar dressing and croutons.

name: 雞肉彩虹沙拉 Cobb Salad
desc:
混合生菜加上蕃茄, 培根, 水煮蛋, 碎藍起司及鱷梨。
Grilled chicken, tomatoes, bacon, egg, bleu cheese crumbles and avocado.

name: 紐奧良香煎海鱸 Blackened Sea Bass
desc:
7 盎司。
7 oz.

name: 舊金山菠菜沙拉 Feta Cheese Spinach Salad
desc:
培根, 水煮蛋, 新鮮蘑菇, 紅洋蔥, 麵包丁及費達起司, 搭配酸甜油醋醬。
Topped with bacon, egg, mushrooms, red onions and croutons in tangy vinaigrette.

name: 哈維斯沙拉 Harvest Salad
desc:
生菜嫩葉加上蘋果, 葡萄, 蕃茄, 蔓越莓乾, 胡桃, 碎藍起司及費達起司, 搭配香料紅酒油醋醬。
Baby greens, green apples, grapes, tomatoes, craisins, toasted pecans, bleu cheese crumbles and feta cheese in creamy herb dressing.

name: 火烤紐約客牛排 Flame Grilled New York Strip
desc:
8 盎司。
8 oz.

name: 辣味檸檬鮮蝦麵 Chili Lemon Shrimp Linguini
desc:
細麵搭配鳳尾蝦, 蘆筍及洋蔥。
Sauteed shrimp, asparagus and onions.

name: 梅爾森醺辣雞翅 Spicy Chili Märzen Wings
desc:
傳統美式酥炸雞翅沾裹以梅爾森拉格調製而成的梅爾森醺辣醬。
Lightly fried and tossed in spicy chili märzen sauce.

name: 梅爾森酥炸比目魚 Märzen Battered Fish & Chips
desc:
沾裹梅爾森奶油麵衣後酥炸, 搭配塔塔醬。
Dipped in marzen batter and fried, with tartar sauce.

name: 瑪格麗特薄餅 Margherita Flatbread
desc:
蕃茄, 羅勒及馬芝瑞拉起司。
Fresh mozzarella, tomatoes, and fresh basil.

desc:

name: 酥炸花枝 Fried Calamari
desc:

name: CYO 起司漢堡 CYO Cheese Burger
desc:

name: 紐奧良鮮蝦雞肉寬麵 Cajun Pasta
